text:
Created attachment 192323
patch

* Update to 0.4.1
  https://github.com/bakins/php-fpm-exporter/releases/tag/v0.4.1
* Change owner and group to prometheus
  See https://reviews.freebsd.org/D14549 for details
* Revise RC script according to rclint, here is outout
    Checking files/phpfpm_exporter.in
    WARNING:root:[56]: Useless use of chown?
    ERROR:root:[37]: Do not clobber blank values for non-mandatory variables
* I'm ok for moving category from sysutils to net-mgmt
